avatarScaling.title: Hloov Loj Me Avatar
avatarScaling.subtitle: VRChat qhov OSC hloov qib siab ntawm nws tus kheej — ua tau nrog txhua tus avatar
avatarScaling.enable: Qhib kev hloov loj me avatar
avatarScaling.saveWorlds: Txuag qib loj thaum hloov ntiaj teb
avatarScaling.recordUp: Kaw yuam sij ua kom loj
avatarScaling.recordDown: Kaw yuam sij ua kom me
avatarScaling.hotkeyHint: Cov yuam sij ceev ua haujlwm txhua qhov (txawm tias VRChat tabtom siv nyob). Yog tias ib qho yuam sij kaw tsis tau, koj tseem siv tau lub slider saum toj no.
avatarScaling.off: Kev hloov loj me avatar tau kaw lawm
translator.title: Neeg Txhais Lus
translator.aiGrammarFix: Kho grammar nrog AI ua ntej (siv IntelliChat provider saum toj no)
translator.note: Siv los ntawm Live Typing lub thawv sib tham qhov kev txhais lus thiab txhua qhov hauv app uas muaj qhov kev xaiv "Txhais ua ntej xa."
liveTyping.title: Ntaus Ntawv Live
liveTyping.subtitle: xa thaum koj tabtom ntaus ntawv, zoo li VRChat nws tus kheej lub thawv sib tham
liveTyping.placeholder: Ntaus ntawv ntawm no — qhov no xa mus rau lub thawv sib tham tsis siv neeg txhua ob peb second thaum koj tabtom ntaus ntawv. Ntxiv ntaus ntawv tawm ntawm 144 tus cim; VRChat yuav qhia '…' + qhov kawg ntawm koj cov lus.
liveTyping.previewLabel: Saib Ua Ntej (yuav qhia dab tsi rau VRChat):
liveTyping.translateLabel: Txhais ua ntej xa (siv Neeg Txhais Lus qhov kev teeb tsa)
languagePicker.title: Xaiv koj hom lus
languagePicker.subtitle: Koj hloov tau qhov no tom qab hauv Kev Teeb Tsa.
settingsLanguage.title: Lus
settingsLanguage.label: App hom lus
